item.title: Why ADHD Planners Often Don’t Work
item.description: Traditional planners often rely on habits that can be especially challenging with ADHD. Learn why they may fall short and what kinds of planning systems tend to work better.

media:content.media:title: Why ADHD Planners Often Don’t Work
media:content.media:description: Traditional planners often rely on habits that can be especially challenging with ADHD. Learn why they may fall short and what kinds of planning systems tend to work better.

item.title: When your brain negotiates with basic facts
item.description: If your brain also negotiates with basic facts, you’re in good company.

media:content.media:title: When your brain negotiates with basic facts
media:content.media:description: If your brain also negotiates with basic facts, you’re in good company.

item.title: The switch flipped and I am not negotiating
item.description: A relatable moment about ADHD and executive dysfunction, as the switch flips and there’s no negotiating.

media:content.media:title: The switch flipped and I am not negotiating
media:content.media:description: A relatable moment about ADHD and executive dysfunction, as the switch flips and there’s no negotiating.

item.title: Drafting the text, then not sending it
item.description: A relatable look at how the brain can perfect a message, then lose momentum before it gets sent.

media:content.media:title: Drafting the text, then not sending it
media:content.media:description: A relatable look at how the brain can perfect a message, then lose momentum before it gets sent.

item.title: Understanding ADHD Beyond Laziness
item.description: A brief look at how ADHD can be misunderstood and why it may affect motivation, focus, and daily routines.

media:content.media:title: Understanding ADHD Beyond Laziness
media:content.media:description: A brief look at how ADHD can be misunderstood and why it may affect motivation, focus, and daily routines.

item.title: The ADHD Rule That Changed Everything
item.description: Sometimes one small change can make a noticeable difference. Learn about the ADHD rule that many people say helps them stay on track and get more done.

media:content.media:title: The ADHD Rule That Changed Everything
media:content.media:description: Sometimes one small change can make a noticeable difference. Learn about the ADHD rule that many people say helps them stay on track and get more done.

item.title: A relatable nervous system moment
item.description: If you know, you know — my nervous system had no business being in that scene.

media:content.media:title: A relatable nervous system moment
media:content.media:description: If you know, you know — my nervous system had no business being in that scene.

item.title: 35 Years of ADHD Advice in 10 Minutes
item.description: A concise look at 35 years of ADHD advice, separating helpful guidance from the noise.

media:content.media:title: 35 Years of ADHD Advice in 10 Minutes
media:content.media:description: A concise look at 35 years of ADHD advice, separating helpful guidance from the noise.

item.title: Hiding ADHD Can Delay Recognition
item.description: A brief look at how masking ADHD can make it harder for others to notice.

media:content.media:title: Hiding ADHD Can Delay Recognition
media:content.media:description: A brief look at how masking ADHD can make it harder for others to notice.

item.title: A relatable ADHD moment from childhood
item.description: A short, relatable reflection on how a childhood comment can stay with you, especially for people familiar with ADHD and parenting.

media:content.media:title: A relatable ADHD moment from childhood
media:content.media:description: A short, relatable reflection on how a childhood comment can stay with you, especially for people familiar with ADHD and parenting.

item.title: The APD step people skip
item.description: A brief note on auditory processing disorder and a step many people overlook before things spiral.

media:content.media:title: The APD step people skip
media:content.media:description: A brief note on auditory processing disorder and a step many people overlook before things spiral.

item.title: ADHD and Anxiety: A One-Minute Check-In
item.description: A brief mindfulness check-in for people with ADHD and anxiety. Notice your shoulders and jaw, then see what changes.

media:content.media:title: ADHD and Anxiety: A One-Minute Check-In
media:content.media:description: A brief mindfulness check-in for people with ADHD and anxiety. Notice your shoulders and jaw, then see what changes.

item.title: Why Some Women Learn They Have ADHD After 35
item.description: A look at why many women discover ADHD later in life, often after age 35.

media:content.media:title: Why Some Women Learn They Have ADHD After 35
media:content.media:description: A look at why many women discover ADHD later in life, often after age 35.

item.title: Why does my brain need subtitles?
item.description: A lighthearted look at feeling like you need subtitles, with a nod to ADHD, auditory processing disorder, and neurodivergence.

media:content.media:title: Why does my brain need subtitles?
media:content.media:description: A lighthearted look at feeling like you need subtitles, with a nod to ADHD, auditory processing disorder, and neurodivergence.

item.title: ADHD Diagnoses in Adults: A Closer Look
item.description: For decades, ADHD was stereotyped as a condition affecting hyperactive schoolboys. However, a massive wave of adult women over 35 are finally getting diagnosed after years of masking their symptoms, often misinterpreting chronic exhaustion, mental load overwhelm, and anxiety as personal failures rather than executive dysfunction.

media:content.media:title: ADHD Diagnoses in Adults: A Closer Look
media:content.media:description: For decades, ADHD was stereotyped as a condition affecting hyperactive schoolboys. However, a massive wave of adult women over 35 are finally getting diagnosed after years of masking their symptoms, often misinterpreting chronic exhaustion, mental load overwhelm, and anxiety as personal failures rather than executive dysfunction.
